key_drivers: Real yields rising sharply (10Y TIPS ~2.01%, up ~30bps since Iran war onset in early March) — primary bearish driver for gold (GC BEARISH) and rate-sensitive equities (ES SLIGHT_BEARISH)

Fed hawkish hold: CME FedWatch shows 99.5% probability of April 29 hold; markets have fully priced out 2026 cuts with 20-45% probability of a rate HIKE now priced — energy shock from Iran war driving sticky inflation
BoJ hawkish tilt with ~70% April 28 hike probability sustains 6J BULLISH; VIX falling today (-2.69%) provides intraday relief but structural risk-off (VIX 23.87 > 20) keeps broad equity bias cautious

stale_sources: FRED DFII10 (last official reading Apr 2, 2026 at 1.97%; estimated at ~2.01% based on SSGA Monthly Gold Monitor April 2026 and streetstats.finance TIPS curve)
FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2 (last official reading Apr 2, 2026 at 3.17%; widening trend confirmed via prior session data)
FRED T10Y2Y (last official reading Apr 3, 2026 at +51bps)

Fed stance: CME FedWatch via whale-alert.io and Binance news (Apr 5-6, 2026) — 99.5% hold probability confirmed
